artifacts.interpretation: Published-gate pass after an extended informed rerun; not full-contract proof.
First-attempt published-gate pass; one post-hoc contract probe also passed.

posthoc_probes.name: valid_multi_letter_cells
posthoc_probes.why: The written C9 contract allows one or more uppercase letters in a column name, but the public properties generate only A-D.

posthoc_probes.name: boolean_value_rejection
posthoc_probes.input_description: A1 contains true rather than an integer literal or formula string.
posthoc_probes.observed: Both artifacts accepted the value because Python bool is a subclass of int.

posthoc_probes.name: unbounded_integer_division
posthoc_probes.observed: Both artifacts returned 33333333333333331968 after losing precision through float conversion.
